sections.sectionTitle: Daniel in Ganhing Li Maangin Mu

verses.text: Belshazzar, Babylon kumpi a suahzawh a kum masa kumin keimah Daniel in mang khat ka man a, zanin maang ka mu hi. Ka mangmat lai-in ka gelh a, tua zana ka maangmuhnate ka ciamtehna hih bang ahi hi
Mun khempeuh panin huihpi hong nungin tuipi tung a seemgawp hi
Tua ciangin tuipi sung panin a kibanglo sa golpi li hong pusuakto uh hi

A masa pen humpinelkai tawh kibang a, ahi zongin muvanlai kha tawh a kibang kha a nei hi. Ka et laitakin a khate gel a hong kibotkhia hi. Leitung panin tua ganhing kidomkaang to-in, mihing bangin a khe nihin kidingsak a, mihing lungsim ama tungah a kipia hi
Tua ciangin a nihna sapi vompi tawh a kibang khat ka mu hi. A nunglam khe tawh dingin a ha tawh nakguh thum pet a, “Na duh zahzah sa tampi ne in,” cihna aw khat a hong ging hi
Ka et lai leh kamkei tawh a kibang sapi dang khat ka mu hi. A nungzangah vasa kha tawh a kibang kha li a nei hi. Tua sapi in lutang li nei a, ukna aana ama tungah a kipia hi

Ka et lai leh sapi lina ka mu hi. Tua sapi kihtakhuai mahmah a, lipkhaphuai-in a thupi mahmah hi. Amah in a gol mahmah sik-ha a nei hi. Amah in nene-in a nek valteng a khe tawh a tuancilgawp hi. Sapi dangte tawh kibang loin amah in ki sawm a nei hi

Tua kite ka et laitakin tuate' lakah adang ki neu khat hong po a, a omsa sung pan ki thumte a botkhia hi. Tua ki' tungah mihing mittang tawh a kibang mittang leh kam om a, kiphatsakna kam tampi a pau hi

Ka et laitakin kumpi tokhomte a hong kikoih hi. A nungta tawntung mipa tua tokhomte khat tungah a tu hi. A puante vuk bangin ngo a, a samte tuumul hoih tawh a kibang hi. A tokhom pen meikuang leengpei tungah kinga-in mei kuang zuazua a
tua sung panin meikuang a hong lengkhia niloh hi. Ama nasem ding mihing tul za tampi om a, a mai-ah mihing tul za sawm tampi a ding uh hi. Thukhenna ding hun kipan a, laibute a kiphen hi
Ka et laitakin tua ki neu in kiphatsakna kamsia a pau ka za hi. Ka et lailai leh tua sapi lian a lina kithat a, a pumpi meikuang sungah kikhulin a kisusia hi
Sapi dangte ahih leh a vangliatna uh kilak khiatsak a, ahih hangin a nuntak laina ding uh hun ciangtan khat a kipia hi
Zan ka maangmuh hun sungin ka khuadak leh mihing tawh a kibang mi khat meii tungah a hong pai ka mu hi. A nungta tawntung mipa kiangah pai-in, ama kiangah a kipia hi

Amah in vangliatna, minthan'na, leh kumpi za ngah ahih manin minam kimte, minam tuamtuamte, paunam tuamtuamte khempeuh in ama na a sem ding uh ahi hi. Amah in a tawntungin uk ding a, a kumpi gam a bei ngei kei ding hi
Ka maangmuhnate in hong linglawng sakin a hong patausak mahmah hi
Ka pama ding mite khat kiangah pai-in hihte khempeuh a khiatna hong hilh in, ci-in ka thum hi. Tua ciangin amah in a khiatna a hong hilh hi
“Hih sapi lite pen leitung panin a hong khangkhia ding kumpi gam li ahi hi
Ahih hangin a Lianpen Pasian' mite in kumpi za ngah ding uh a, a tawntungin a nei paisuak ding uh hi,” hong ci hi
Tua ciangin a dangte tawh a kibanglo a kihtakhuai sik-ha leh sumngo khecin a nei sapi lina thu ka thei nuam hi. Amah in nene-in na khempeuh tuancilgawp hi

Tua ciangin a lu tungah ki sawm leh, a nung ciangin ki khat hong po a, a omsa kite sung pan ki thum a kitanna thu ka thei nuam hi. Amah in mittang leh kiphatsakna kamsia pauna ding kam a nei hi. A dangte sangin nakpi takin kihtakhuai zaw hi
Ka et laitakin, tua ki in Pasian' mite galin do a, amaute a zogawp hi
Tua ciangin a nungta tawntung mipa hong pai a, a Lianpen Pasian' mite-a' ding a hoih thukhenna a hong gen hi. Pasian' mite in kumpi za a ngahna ding uh hun a hong tung hi

Hih bangin hilhtelna kei a hong kipia hi: “Sapi lina pen leitunga hong om ding kumpi gam lina ding hi a, kumpi gamdangte tawh kilamdang mahmah ding hi. Amah in leitung buppi valhtum ding a, tuancil gawpin a sukham ding hi

“Ki sawmte pen tua kumpi gamsung panin a hong piang ding kumpi sawmte ahi uh hi. Tua ciangin kumpi dang khat hong piang leuleu ding a, amah in a omsate tawh a kilamdang mahmahin kumpi thum a nuaisiah ding hi

“Amah in a Lianpen Pasian langpangin thu gen ding a, Pasian' mite a bawlsia ding hi. Amah in amaute' biakna tawh kipawl thukhamte leh pawi bawlna hunte kheelsak ding hanciam ding a, ama khutsungah kum thum leh alang sung Pasian' mite a om ding uh hi
“Tua ciangin thukhenna hun hong kipan ding a, ama vangliatna lakkhiat sakin, amah a kisusia maimang ding hi

“Hih leitung kumpi gam, vangliat-na, leh liatna khempeuh a Lianpen Pasian' mite tungah a kipia ding hi. Amau' kumpi za cikmah hunin bei ngeilo ding a, leitung ukna za a nei khempeuhte in a thu uh mangin amaute' na a sem ding uh hi,” hong ci hi
Hih tangthu a beina hita hi. Hih thu ka ngaihsut ciangin keimah Daniel ka lau mahmah a, ka mel a daanggawp hi. Ahih hangin hih thu keima lungsim sung bekah ka koih hi.
